title: Savory Chicken Noodle Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Chinese-inspired stir fry made with chicken, noodles, and vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the soy sauce and sugar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the noodles to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the chicken is coated in the sauce.
Stir in the chopped scallions and serve hot.
